name: Clawsmith Observer
description: Auto-start clawsmith daemon, append monitor cards to outbound replies, and expose a lightweight dashboard.

clawsmithBin.description: Path or command name for clawsmith binary.

execTimeoutMs.description: Timeout for each clawsmith command execution.

autoStartDaemon.description: Start clawsmith daemon automatically on gateway start when needed.

autoAppendMonitorCard.description: Append the latest turn summary to outbound messages via message_sending hook.

appendIntervalSec.description: Fallback minimum interval per conversation when turn index is unavailable.

channelAllowlist.description: If set, only these channels receive monitor cards.

dashboardBasePath.description: Base path for dashboard and API.

openclawStateDir.description: Optional explicit OpenClaw state dir (defaults to OPENCLAW_STATE_DIR or ~/.openclaw).

metricsTurnLimit.description: Maximum turns returned in metrics view.
